Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedListFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts request limits for data storage with universe filtering.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves performance and reliability of data storage for games.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedListPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of data store requests per player based on universe settings.
Added_Other.purpose: Optimizes data management and improves game performance.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedReadFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Imposes a limit on the number of read requests for data stores.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair usage and prevents overload on data storage systems.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedReadPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of data store read requests per player to improve performance.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures smoother gameplay by preventing too many data requests from slowing down the game.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedRemoveFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the request limits for data store operations with universe filters.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances performance and reliability of data storage for games.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedRemovePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of remove requests a player can make to the data store based on the universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Helps manage server performance by preventing excessive data requests from a single player.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedWriteFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the limit on how many ordered write requests can be made to the data store with a universe filter.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves performance and reliability when saving player data across different game universes.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedWritePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of data store write requests per player based on the universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair usage of data storage, improving performance and stability for all players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardListFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a fixed limit on standard list data store requests with a universe filter.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures smoother data handling for player inventories and lists in games with multiple universes.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardListPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of data store requests per player to improve performance.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures smoother gameplay by reducing server load for individual players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardReadFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Added_Other.purpose: Helps maintain consistent performance and prevents overloads when accessing player data.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardReadPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a cap on the number of read requests a player can make to the data store for a specific universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves server efficiency by controlling how much data a player can access at once.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardRemoveFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Removes the fixed limit on data store requests for better flexibility.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows developers to manage player data more efficiently, enhancing game experiences.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardRemovePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the limit on how many data store requests a player can make based on the universe they are in.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows players to have more flexibility in saving and loading their game data without hitting request limits.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardWriteFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Implements a fixed limit on data store write requests with a universe filter.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair usage of data storage, preventing overloads and improving stability.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardWritePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of data store write requests per player to improve performance.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures smoother gameplay by preventing data overload for individual players.

Added_Other.purpose: Enhances security by controlling which cloud URLs can be accessed.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Tracks the current version of the code using a dynamic string from the Git repository.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers manage and identify code changes, ensuring smoother updates for players.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Records the time when certain game events occur using a dynamic string.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves tracking of game events, leading to better game stability and performance.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a fast-access string representation of the current Git hash for version tracking.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers quickly identify the version of the game, aiding in updates and bug fixes.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes how timestamps are formatted and displayed in strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Makes time-related information appear faster and more efficiently in the game.
